scope: remote and loopback vMLX API sessions

root_cause.bad_behavior: remote Auto reasoning injected enable_thinking=true whenever sessionHasReasoningParser was true
root_cause.why_wrong: reasoning parser presence is not a model-owned thinking default and can force Qwen/MiMo/Gemma/N2 style sessions into the wrong reasoning mode

behavior_after_fix: Auto reasoning omits enable_thinking for local and remote sessions
explicit reasoning on/off still forwards enable_thinking where supported
local explicit reasoning still mirrors enable_thinking into chat_template_kwargs
remote explicit reasoning does not send chat_template_kwargs
strict third-party API hosts still suppress unsupported enable_thinking fields

verification.command: cd panel && npm exec vitest -- run tests/request-builder.test.ts

proven: request-builder contract no longer fabricates enable_thinking=true for remote Auto sessions with a reasoning parser
explicit remote thinking on sends enable_thinking=true without chat_template_kwargs
explicit remote thinking off sends enable_thinking=false
local Auto still omits enable_thinking and chat_template_kwargs
tool format and pinned tool_choice request-builder coverage remains green
exact-output tool prompt source guard is still present for reply-exactly style prompts
not_proven_here: live same-model direct/gateway/tunnel SSE streaming for all families
raw function_call arguments delta/done for Qwen3.6/Qwen-coder-next after this UI fix
MiMo/Gemma/N2/Qwen live auto/on/off reasoning behavior in the installed app
other_agent_next: Run live direct/gateway/tunnel raw SSE captures with Auto reasoning omitted, explicit on, and explicit off
Confirm Responses output_text.delta, reasoning delta, function_call_arguments.delta/done, output_item indices, final response object consistency, and no raw XML/thinking leaks
Use the same model alias on direct/gateway/tunnel; do not mix deployed aliases when proving the empty-args bug
For UI proof, inspect CHAT_DIAG request_shape and confirm Auto requests have no enable_thinking key
